exploration_notes: Stack clash protection in GCC spans these key files: (1) gcc/config/i386/i386.cc contains x86_64-specific stack clash probing via `get_probe_interval()` (line 6936) which checks `flag_stack_clash_protection`, and `dump_stack_clash_frame_info()` calls at lines 8229-8403 implementing inline/loop probe strategies.
